evidence: Sub-phase 2.3 (walk-ancestors / FGAP-029 partial) landed at HEAD 7cb17f0. Library walkAncestors exported from project-context.ts:359 (mirrors walkDescendants at project-context.ts:325 inverted; visited-set cycle protection; filters edges by e.child + e.relation_type and recurses on e.parent). Wrapper walkAncestorsByLens exported from lens-view.ts:268 (mirrors walkLensDescendants at lens-view.ts:255). Pi tool walk-ancestors registered at index.ts:1194; existing project-walk-descendants tool preserved at index.ts:1164 (coexistence). Orchestrator script scripts/orchestrator/walk-ancestors.ts shebang-executable. tsconfig.json gained @davidorex/pi-context/lens-view path mapping (one-line addition mirroring existing project-sdk subpath pattern). Tests: pi-context 413 → 420 (+7 covering linear DAG / branching / cycle protection / no-ancestors / relation-type filter + 2 walkAncestorsByLens wrapper tests). Husky pre-commit gate green at commit time. Closure-table runtime demo deferred to Phase 5 (per-test fixtures own synthetic relations.json; live .project/relations.json doesn't exist until Phase 5).
